details: The Labor Department of Chhattisgarh launched the "Mukhyamantri Shramik Aujaar Sahayata Yojana" on October 1, 2010, through the Building and Construction Workers Welfare Board. Under this scheme, 10,000 tool kits are distributed annually to registered construction workers, including masons, electricians, plumbers, carpenters, porters, painters, and others, who have been registered with the board for a minimum of 90 days.
benefits: Tool kits can given free of cost to the registered construction worker.
eligibility: The Applicant must be a native of Chhattisgarh.
The beneficiary should be a construction worker.
The beneficiary should be registered under the Building and Construction Workers Welfare Board.
The age of the registered worker should not be less than 18 years.

online: Registration of a Construction Worker Under CBOCWWB

When you click on submit, your registration ID will be sent to your mobile and email.
All the applicant have to visit the official
On the home page click on "
" under "Chhattisgarh Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board
Select : "Building and Other Construction Workers Welfare Board".
What do you want to do : "Application".
Select your district name and provide old/new registration number and click proceed.
When you enter the district and registration number, an OTP will be sent to your mobile for verification.
After this, a dashboard will open in front of you, containing information about your name, address, age, and caste etc.
After that, you select your Yojana and upload your important documents and basic information.
Click "Submit" to register yourself for this scheme.

documents_required: Self-declaration certificate in the prescribed form issued by the government in respect of the employer.

faqs.question: What is this scheme?
faqs.answer: The "Building and Construction Workers Welfare Board" of the Chhattisgarh Government provided financial assistance to registered workers who buy tool kits.

faqs.question: Who introduced the scheme?
faqs.answer: The scheme was introduced by the Labor Department of Chhattisgarh.

faqs.question: What benefits are provided under the scheme?
faqs.answer: Tool kits can given free of cost to the registered construction worker.

faqs.question: What is the purpose of the financial assistance?
faqs.answer: The main purpose of the scheme is to empower the construction workers.

faqs.question: How often are the tool kits distributed under the scheme?
faqs.answer: The tool kits are distributed annually to the registered construction workers.

faqs.question: How to apply for the scheme?
faqs.answer: The applicant has to visit the official website Chhattisgarh Labour Department.

faqs.question: What is the official website to apply for the scheme?
Is there any age limit for workers?
faqs.answer: Yes, the registered construction worker's age is between 18 and 50 years.

faqs.question: Is it necessary to register the construction worker?
faqs.answer: Yes, the construction worker should be registered on the Building and Construction Workers Welfare Board.
